subject: Wingull, a seagull-like Pokemon with white and blue plumage, depicted in flight over ocean
description: A white and blue bird Pokemon soars across the frame with wings outstretched, viewed from slightly below and in front. The body is predominantly white with blue wing-tip and tail markings, and the long pointed beak is orange-yellow. Below and behind the bird, a calm blue ocean stretches to the horizon under a bright, clear sky. In the far background, a dock or harbor scene is faintly visible. The art is rendered in a clean, bright illustrative style with soft lighting and a cheerful coastal atmosphere.
foreground: Wingull in flight, wings spread wide, white and blue plumage
background: Calm ocean surface under clear blue sky, faint harbor in distance
